Feature_Name: Inter gNB DU LTM Handover UE Context Setup
Feature_Description: The gNB-CU prepares and sends an F1AP "UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST" message to a candidate gNB-DU.
The candidate gNB-DU responds with an F1AP "UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE" message.
This procedure is handled on the gNB-CU for Inter gNB DU LTM Handover.
Feature_Objectives: To establish the UE context in the gNB-DU during an Inter gNB DU LTM Handover.
To facilitate LTM configuration procedures between the gNB-CU and candidate gNB-DUs.
Procedure_Implementation_Steps: The gNB-CU-CP decides to initiate LTM configuration (as per step 1 in 8.2.1.6).
LTM configuration procedures are performed between gNB-CU and candidate gNB-DUs (as per step 4 in 8.2.1.6).
The gNB-CU prepares and sends the F1AP "UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST" message to the candidate gNB-DU to establish the UE context.
The candidate gNB-DU processes the request and responds with the F1AP "UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE" message to the gNB-CU.
Piggy_Backed_IES_Info: Not applicable for the scoped messages in this procedure.
